server.note: Server was recreated from host port 33001 to host port 3000 because the FLOW-12 Playwright suite checks localhost:3000 health.

commands.name: FLOW-12 Playwright suite, first run
commands.command: $env:VITE_PORT='5176'; Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/subscription-billing.spec.ts --reporter=line; Pop-Location
commands.result: 21 passed, 6 failed; failures were stale tenant-admin dashboard expectations against the default anonymous pricing branch.

commands.name: FLOW-12 Playwright suite, repaired run
commands.command: $env:VITE_PORT='5176'; Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/subscription-billing.spec.ts --reporter=line; Pop-Location

commands.name: client TypeScript
commands.command: Push-Location client; npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; Pop-Location

commands.name: phase-close portability/auth scan
commands.command: FLOW-12 server flow scan for throw new, MicroserviceBase, nestjs-cls, direct TenantContext imports, direct SDK imports, and any types

repairNotes: R-07, R-08, and the P1 state coverage test now enter /billing-dashboard?role=tenant-admin explicitly.
Invoice status assertions now match the current user-facing title-case labels: Paid, Failed, Voided.
The production billing page already exposed the required tenant-admin selectors; only the stale E2E role setup was changed.

docs/e2e-snapshots/repo-evidence.note: Repo evidence screenshots exist globally; FLOW-12 cascade-specific repo screenshots are produced during fork cascade phases.
